system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.createpurcharseorder_ver2","body":"
CREATE PROC [dbo].[CreatePurcharseOrder_Ver2]
( 
	@order_number nvarchar(max), 
	@OrderType    int
)
AS
BEGIN

    DECLARE @ORDERNUMBER TABLE
    ( 
	    ID           int, 
	    ORDER_NUMBER nvarchar(200), 
	    ITEM_NUMBER  nvarchar(200), 
	    ORDER_QTY    int
    )

    INSERT INTO @ORDERNUMBER
    ( 
		 ID
	    , ORDER_NUMBER
	    , ITEM_NUMBER
	    , ORDER_QTY
    )
    SELECT 
		 id
	    , order_number
	    , item_number
	    , SUM(order_qty) AS order_qty
    --INTO #ORDERNUMBER
    FROM   tr_order_detail
    WHERE  order_number IN
    (
	   SELECT dbo.TRIM(value)
	   FROM   dbo.fn_Split( @order_number, ',' )
    )
    AND Finished = 0
    AND choduyet = '1'
    AND f_cancelled = 'N'
    GROUP BY id
		 , order_number
		 , item_number
    ORDER BY id


    ---*** ĐỊNH MỨC NGŨ KIM ***---
    IF @OrderType = 1
    BEGIN

	   DECLARE @NGUKIM TABLE
	   ( 
		   ID           int, 
		   ORDER_NUMBER nvarchar(200), 
		   ITEM_NUMBER  nvarchar(200), 
		   MAVT         nvarchar(200), 
		   ORDER_QTY    int, 
		   CAPPHAT      nvarchar(50), 
		   SOLUONG      decimal(18, 3)
	   )
	   INSERT INTO @NGUKIM
	   SELECT B.id
		   , b.order_number
		   , b.item_number
		   , A.mavt
		   , b.order_qty
		   , CASE WHEN HWforWW = 1 THEN N'Trước Sơn' ELSE N'Sau Sơn' END AS capphat
		   , SUM(A.soluong * B.order_qty) AS SOLUONG
	   --INTO #NGUKIM
	   FROM   tr_dinhmuc_ngukim AS A
			RIGHT JOIN @ORDERNUMBER AS B --#ORDERNUMBER B
			ON A.masp = B.item_number
	   WHERE  A.mavt IS NOT NULL
			AND A.hoanthanh = 1
	   GROUP BY B.id
			, b.order_number
			, b.item_number
			, b.order_qty
			, A.mavt
			, CASE WHEN HWforWW = 1 THEN N'Trước Sơn' ELSE N'Sau Sơn' END

	   SELECT 
			B.mancc
		   , B.nhom
		   , A.mavt
		   , b.tenvt
		   , B.mota
		   , B.dvt
		   , B.quycach
		   , B.mausac
		   , A.SOLUONG
		   , B.dongia
		   , B.dongia_goc
		   , b.loaitien
		   , a.item_number
		   , a.order_qty
		   , a.order_number
		   , A.capphat
		   , a.SOLUONG / b.soluong1kg as kg
		   , b.soluong1kg
	   FROM   @NGUKIM AS A
			INNER JOIN tr_material AS B ON A.mavt = ISNULL(B.idxuong, B.mavt)
	   WHERE  B.xoa = 'N'
	   ORDER BY A.id, a.mavt --B.mancc, B.nhom, A.mavt, a.item_number
    END

    ---*** ĐỊNH MỨC BAO BÌ, ĐÓNG GÓI ***---
    IF @OrderType = 2
    BEGIN
	   SELECT 
			b.order_number
		   , b.item_number
		   , b.order_qty
		   , A.madonggoi AS mavt
			--, SUM(CAST(A.soluong AS decimal(18,2)) * B.order_qty) AS SOLUONG
		   , CAST(A.soluong AS decimal(18, 2)) * B.order_qty AS SOLUONG
		   , B.id
	   INTO #BAOBI
	   FROM   tr_dinhmuc_donggoi AS A
			RIGHT JOIN @ORDERNUMBER AS B --#ORDERNUMBER B
			ON A.masp = B.item_number
	   WHERE  A.madonggoi IS NOT NULL
			AND A.hoanthanh = 1
	   --GROUP BY B.id, b.order_number, b.item_number, b.order_qty, A.madonggoi

	   SELECT B.mancc
		   , B.nhom
		   , A.mavt
		   , b.tenvt
		   , B.mota
		   , B.dvt
		   , B.quycach
		   , B.mausac
		   , A.SOLUONG
		   , B.dongia
		   , B.dongia_goc
		   , b.loaitien
		   , a.item_number
		   , a.order_qty
		   , a.order_number
		   , NULL AS capphat
		   , a.SOLUONG / b.soluong1kg as kg
		   , b.soluong1kg
	   FROM   #BAOBI AS A
			INNER JOIN tr_material AS B
			ON A.mavt = ISNULL(B.idxuong, B.mavt)
	   WHERE  B.xoa = 'N'
	   ORDER BY A.id, a.mavt --B.mancc, B.nhom, A.mavt, a.item_number
    END

    ---*** ĐỊNH MỨC SƠN ***---
    IF @OrderType = 3
    BEGIN
	   SELECT b.order_number
		   , b.item_number
		   , b.order_qty
		   , A.mact AS mavt
		   , SUM((CAST(A.sl_sp AS float) * CAST(B.order_qty AS float))) AS SOLUONG
		   , B.id
	   INTO #SON
	   FROM   tr_dinhmuc_son AS A
			RIGHT JOIN @ORDERNUMBER AS B --#ORDERNUMBER B
			ON A.masp = B.item_number
	   WHERE  A.mact IS NOT NULL
			AND A.hoanthanh = 1
	   GROUP BY b.order_number
			, b.item_number
			, b.order_qty
			, A.mact
			, B.id

	   SELECT B.mancc
		   , B.nhom
		   , A.mavt
		   , b.tenvt
		   , B.mota
		   , B.dvt
		   , B.quycach
		   , B.mausac
		   , A.SOLUONG
		   , B.dongia
		   , B.dongia_goc
		   , b.loaitien
		   , a.item_number
		   , a.order_qty
		   , a.order_number
		   , NULL AS capphat
		   , a.SOLUONG / b.soluong1kg as kg
		   , b.soluong1kg
	   FROM   #SON AS A
			INNER JOIN tr_material AS B
			ON A.mavt = ISNULL(B.idxuong, B.mavt)
	   WHERE  B.xoa = 'N'
	   ORDER BY A.id, a.mavt --B.mancc, B.nhom, A.mavt, a.item_number
    END

    ---*** ĐỊNH MỨC HÀNG TRẮNG ***---
    IF @OrderType = 4
    BEGIN
	   SELECT b.order_number
		   , b.item_number
		   , b.order_qty
		   , A.mact AS mavt
		   , SUM((CAST(A.soluong AS float) * CAST(B.order_qty AS float))) AS SOLUONG
		   , B.id
	   INTO #HANGTRANG
	   FROM   tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang AS A
			RIGHT JOIN @ORDERNUMBER AS B ON A.masp = B.item_number
	   WHERE  A.mact IS NOT NULL
			AND A.hoanthanh = 1
	   GROUP BY b.order_number
			, b.item_number
			, b.order_qty
			, A.mact
			, B.id

	   SELECT B.mancc
		   , B.nhom
		   , A.mavt
		   , b.tenvt
		   , B.mota
		   , B.dvt
		   , B.quycach
		   , B.mausac
		   , A.SOLUONG
		   , B.dongia
		   , B.dongia_goc
		   , b.loaitien
		   , a.item_number
		   , a.order_qty
		   , a.order_number
		   , NULL AS capphat
		   , a.SOLUONG / b.soluong1kg as kg
		   , b.soluong1kg
	   FROM   #HANGTRANG AS A
			INNER JOIN tr_material AS B
			ON A.mavt = ISNULL(B.idxuong, B.mavt)
	   WHERE  B.xoa = 'N'
	   ORDER BY A.id, a.mavt --B.mancc, B.nhom, A.mavt, a.item_number
    END
END","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.fn_split","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_order_detail"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
